title: ci-watcher input
description: Required dispatch-context keys for the ci-watcher role, per agents/ci-watcher.md Inputs section. Two scoping forms are valid: branch-scoped (branch + expectedHeadSha) or PR-scoped (prNumber, used by orchestrators that raise the PR first and then watch its checks). Consumed by callers for pre-dispatch validation only -- never appended to the prompt or shown to the LLM.

branch.description: Sprint branch to check CI for (branch-scoped form).

expectedHeadSha.description: The commit SHA CI should have run against (branch-scoped form).

prNumber.description: Pull request whose checks to watch (PR-scoped form).
